nav.label: Getting Started
nav.description: Get started with Mat Expressive — installation, configuration, and your first components.

children.label: What is Mat Expressive?
children.description: An introduction to Mat Expressive — a collection of components, directives, and styles for Angular Material aligned with the Material Design 3 Expressive Design System.

children.label: Installation
children.description: Step-by-step guide to installing and configuring Mat Expressive in your Angular project, including style setup and HTML element style options.

nav.label: Components
nav.description: Browse all Mat Expressive components with interactive demos, API references, and styling guides.

children.label: All Buttons
children.description: All button components — Button, Icon Button, Button Group, Split Button, and FAB Menu.

children.label: Button
children.description: Material Expressive Button with size, shape, and toggle variations. Supports both the `.mat-exp-button` CSS class approach and the `[matExpButton]` directive.

children.label: Icon Button
children.description: Material Expressive Icon Button with size, shape, toggle, appearance, and width variations. Supports both the CSS class approach and the matExpIconButton directive.

children.label: Overview
children.description: Overview: Material Expressive Icon Button with size, shape, toggle, appearance, and width variations. Supports both the CSS class approach and the matExpIconButton directive.

children.label: API
children.description: API reference for the Mat Expressive Icon Button — data attributes for the CSS class approach and the matExpIconButton directive.

children.label: Styling
children.description: Styling API for the mat-exp-icon-button-styles SCSS mixin, including the skip-html-element-styles option.

children.label: Playground
children.description: Interactive playground for Icon Button.

children.label: Button Group
children.description: Material Expressive Button Group for grouping buttons with single/multi-select behavior, compatible with Angular reactive and template-driven forms.

children.label: Overview
children.description: Overview: Material Expressive Button Group for grouping buttons with single/multi-select behavior, compatible with Angular reactive and template-driven forms.

children.label: API
children.description: API reference for the MatExpButtonGroup component.

children.label: Styling
children.description: Styling API for the mat-exp-button-group-styles SCSS mixin, including the skip-html-element-styles option and its effects on layout.

children.label: Playground
children.description: Interactive playground for Button Group.

children.label: Split Button
children.description: Material Expressive Split Button combining a primary action button with a secondary chevron that reveals additional menu options.

children.label: Overview
children.description: Overview: Material Expressive Split Button combining a primary action button with a secondary chevron that reveals additional menu options.

children.label: API
children.description: API reference for the MatExpSplitButton component.

children.label: Styling
children.description: Styling API for the mat-exp-split-button-styles SCSS mixin, including the skip-html-element-styles option and layout effects.

children.label: Playground
children.description: Interactive playground for Split Button.

children.label: FAB Menu
children.description: Material Expressive FAB Menu — directives that style a standard Angular Material FAB button and menu with M3 Expressive color and shape transitions.

children.label: Overview
children.description: Overview: Material Expressive FAB Menu — directives that style a standard Angular Material FAB button and menu with M3 Expressive color and shape transitions.

children.label: API
children.description: API reference for the MatExpFabMenu directive and MatExpFabMenuTrigger directive.

children.label: Styling
children.description: Styling API for the mat-exp-fab-menu-styles and mat-exp-fab-menu-trigger-styles SCSS mixins.

children.label: Playground
children.description: Interactive playground for FAB Menu.

children.label: Loading & Progress
children.description: Loading and progress indicator components.

children.label: Loading Indicator
children.description: Material Expressive Loading Indicator — a GSAP-animated SVG that morphs through seven M3 canonical shapes with spring-bounce rotation, fully accessible as a progressbar role.

children.label: Overview
children.description: Overview: Material Expressive Loading Indicator — a GSAP-animated SVG that morphs through seven M3 canonical shapes with spring-bounce rotation, fully accessible as a progressbar role.

children.label: API
children.description: API reference for MatExpLoadingIndicator — host attributes, inputs, animation callbacks, provider options, and advanced exports.

children.label: Styling
children.description: CSS variables, internal structure, and motion token guidance for the Mat Expressive Loading Indicator.

children.label: Playground
children.description: Interactive playground for Loading Indicator.

nav.label: Styles API
nav.description: SCSS mixin API reference for Mat Expressive styles — apply all styles or selectively include specific component styles.

children.label: All Styles API
children.description: API reference for the mat-exp-all-styles SCSS mixin that applies all Mat Expressive component styles at once.

children.label: All Buttons Styles API
children.description: API reference for the mat-exp-all-buttons-styles SCSS mixin that applies all button-related Mat Expressive styles at once.
